choices.text: Domain randomization (vary friction, mass, sensors, lighting) + system identification (measure real, tune sim) + real-world fine-tuning. Three pillars; each addresses different gap source.
TurtleBot 4 (~$2k, ROS 2 native) for mobile or Crazyflie 2.1 (~$200) for drones. Full ROS 2 ecosystem; designed for education. Industrial (UR/Franka $30k+) overkill.

Defense in depth: mechanical (padding) + hardware (E-stops, redundant sensors) + firmware (joint limits, watchdog) + software (velocity caps, collision detect) + operational (workspace fencing). Each layer catches failures.
Linux PREEMPT_RT + CPU isolation (isolcpus) + pre-allocated memory (no malloc in loop) + lock-free comms. Deterministic deadlines; industrial control loops at 1kHz+.

Portfolio (GitHub + demos + papers) + specialize in growth area (RL, manipulation, perception, humanoids). Active in open source ROS 2 / MoveIt / Nav2. ICRA/IROS papers. Salary $130-300k+ for senior roles.
